home.subtitle: Premium cuts, fades and beard work — crafted by a team that takes pride in every detail.

teaserTeam.title: Our Team
teaserTeam.body: A small crew of experienced barbers — each with their own style and specialty.

teaserPrices.title: Services & Prices
teaserPrices.body: Classic cuts, fades, beard trims and combo deals. Transparent pricing, no surprises.

teaserContact.title: Find Us
teaserContact.body: Maarschalk Fochstraat 5, Leopoldsburg. Open six days a week — walk-ins welcome.

about.heading: More than a haircut. An experience.
about.text: King of Barber was born out of a simple conviction: every man deserves a great cut. Based in the heart of Leopoldsburg, we've built a space where precision meets relaxation — where traditional barbering craft is paired with a sharp modern eye. Our team of skilled barbers takes pride in every detail, from the first consultation to the final finish. Whether you're after a classic cut, a clean fade or a beard that turns heads, you'll leave King of Barber looking and feeling your best. Walk-ins are always welcome.

team.intro: A tight-knit crew of skilled barbers — each bringing their own technique and personality to the chair.

prices.intro: All prices include a hot towel finish. Walk-ins welcome — appointments recommended on weekends.
prices.disclaimer: Prices are placeholder values — confirmed pricing coming soon.
